title: Seemingly shareable memory ports don't get merged

features.name: memory as array of 1-bit regs with loop access
features.description: Code should include a memory implemented as an unpacked array of 1-bit registers, where adjacent bits are accessed via loop index (ram[base+i] where i iterates 0 to N-1)

features.name: adjacent bit memory access via indexed loop
features.description: Code should include a for loop that accesses consecutive memory locations using an index variable to write/read adjacent bits of a wider word
